  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Significant void space exists behind the trench shield/box, which can lead to lateral soil movement, loss of cave-in protection, or structural failure of the shield under sudden impact loading."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Backfill and compact the voids behind the trench shield to prevent lateral movement of the soil and ensure proper contact with the trench walls.",
    "Restrict entry into the trench until the voids are properly filled and the protective system is verified safe by a competent person."
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires protective systems to be installed and used in a manner that minimizes the hazard of cave-ins. Voids behind a trench shield allow the surrounding soil to move laterally, which can cause sudden collapse or damage to the shield, rendering the protective system ineffective.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart P Appendix B",
    "OSHA 1926.652(g)"
  ]
}
